name: @compr/opscontext-chrome
description: OpsContext Browser Capture — streams Claude.ai and ChatGPT prompt/response events to your local OpsContext audit log.

scripts.build: node scripts/sync-manifest-version.mjs && tsc && node scripts/bundle-content.mjs && node scripts/copy-static.mjs
scripts.package: npm run clean && npm run build && cd dist && zip -r ../opscontext-chrome-$npm_package_version.zip .
